summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EMERGENCY pillar. All backend APIs working correctly (23/23 tests passed). Frontend Emergency page loads with red/urgent theme, displays 8 emergency types, 24/7 hotline number, 4 seeded partners with 24/7 badges, products and bundles sections. Admin Emergency Manager loads with 5 tabs (Emergencies, Partners, Products, Bundles, Settings) and shows correct stats. Navbar 'More' dropdown includes Emergency link.
seed_data_creation: Data was seeded by main agent - 4 partners (3 are 24/7), 12 products, 5 bundles. Test data created during testing: 2 emergency requests, 1 test partner, 1 test product, 1 test bundle, 1 emergency contact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Emergency pillar fully functional. Backend APIs: /api/emergency/config (8 types, hotline), /api/emergency/vets (4 partners), /api/emergency/products (12 products), /api/emergency/bundles (5 bundles), /api/emergency/admin/stats, /api/emergency/admin/settings, /api/emergency/requests, /api/emergency/request (POST). Frontend: EmergencyPage.jsx with red theme, EmergencyManager.jsx with 5 tabs in admin panel. Navbar has Emergency in 'More' dropdown.

api_verification./api/emergency/config: 200 OK - 8 emergency types, severity levels, hotline +91 96631 85747
api_verification./api/emergency/admin/stats: 200 OK - stats with 4 partners, 12 products, 5 bundles
api_verification./api/emergency/request (POST): 200 OK - creates emergency with Service Desk ticket

Notifications - Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Sound Alerts toggles
